home.title: Six Second Scribbles
home.subtitle: Gioco di disegno multiplayer
home.createOrJoin: Crea o unisciti a una stanza
home.step1: Ogni giocatore riceve una categoria con {count} elementi da disegnare
home.step2: Disegnane il maggior numero possibile in {time} secondi
home.step3: Indovina cosa hanno disegnato gli altri giocatori
home.step4: Sia il disegnatore che l'indovinatore guadagnano punti per le risposte corrette!
home.footerText: Una versione web multiplayer di {original} di Gamely Games · Ispirato a {inspiration} · {source}

lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for host to start the game…
lobby.waitingForMore: Waiting for more players to join…
lobby.leaveDialogText: Are you sure you want to leave this room?

roomEntry.roomInProgress: The room is in progress. You can watch now and join when it returns to the lobby.
roomEntry.invalidCodeText: Room codes are 6 characters using A–Z and 0–9. Check the code and try again.
roomEntry.roomNotExist: This room does not exist, bringing you back to the lobby...
roomEntry.tryGoBack: Try going back to the lobby and re-entering the code.
roomEntry.needNameText: We need a player name before joining this room. Your saved language preference will be used automatically.

results.readyWaiting: ✓ Ready! Waiting for host to start new game...
